tasks.instruction: Conduct market research on interactive audiobook and learning platforms. Analyze existing competitors, market trends, target audience, and create a comprehensive Product Requirements Document (PRD) for the Genesis platform. The PRD should include detailed specifications for all features mentioned in the user's requirements: Dynamic Audiobook Generation, Personalized Learning & Comprehension Tools, Interactive Reading & Annotation, Contextual Research & Expansion, and Interactive Dialogue & Reflective Integration. Save the PRD at '/data/chats/4mwmi/workspace/docs/genesis_prd.json'.

Design a complete system architecture for the Genesis platform based on the PRD created by Emma. The architecture should include component diagrams, data flow, API specifications, technology stack recommendations, and integration points for various AI models needed for voice synthesis, text analysis, quiz generation, mind mapping, etc. Save the system design at '/data/chats/4mwmi/workspace/docs/genesis_system_design.json'.

Develop a web-based prototype of the Genesis platform using React, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS. Implement the core user interface and functionality based on Bob's system design. Focus on creating a minimum viable product that demonstrates the key features: file upload, text extraction, voice synthesis, interactive quizzes, annotation capabilities, and AI-powered conversation. The prototype should include all necessary frontend components and simulated backend services. Save the code at '/data/chats/4mwmi/workspace/src/'.
